label: Blank pipeline
description: Start from an empty graph. Add your own trigger, nodes, and storage.

label: Evaluate conversation quality
description: LLM-as-judge quality evaluation over a complete session. Runs after each session ends.

label: LLM-as-judge scoring
description: Custom rubric evaluation with configurable prompt. Supports scoring, structured output, and optional result persistence.

label: Per-message guardrail check
description: Real-time check on each incoming user message. Use to enforce content policies or route to escalation.
